en: On the day when Moses had finished setting up the tabernacle and had anointed and consecrated it with all its furnishings and had anointed and consecrated the altar with all its utensils,
zh: 摩西豎立了帳幕的那天，就用膏抹它，使它成聖；又把其中的一切器具、祭壇和祭壇的一切器具，都用膏抹了，使它們成聖；

en: the chiefs of Israel, heads of their fathers' houses, who were the chiefs of the tribes, who were over those who were listed, approached
zh: 以色列的眾領袖，就是他們父家的首領，都來奉獻；就是眾支派的領袖，是管理那些被數點的人的。

en: and brought their offerings before the LORD, six wagons and twelve oxen, a wagon for every two of the chiefs, and for each one an ox. They brought them before the tabernacle.
zh: 他們把自己的供物帶到耶和華的面前，就是六輛篷車和十二頭公牛，每兩個領袖奉獻一輛篷車，每個領袖奉獻一頭公牛；他們把這些都送到帳幕的面前。

en: Then the LORD said to Moses,
zh: 耶和華對摩西說：

en: "Accept these from them, that they may be used in the service of the tent of meeting, and give them to the Levites, to each man according to his service."
zh: “你要把這些收下，好作會幕事務的使用；你要把這些交給利未人，要按照各人所辦的事務給他們。”

en: So Moses took the wagons and the oxen and gave them to the Levites.
zh: 於是摩西收下了車和牛，交給利未人。

en: Two wagons and four oxen he gave to the sons of Gershon, according to their service.
zh: 他按著革順子孫所辦的事務，把兩輛車和四頭牛交給他們。

en: And four wagons and eight oxen he gave to the sons of Merari, according to their service, under the direction of Ithamar the son of Aaron the priest.
zh: 又按著米拉利子孫所辦的事務，把四輛車和八頭牛交給他們；他們都受亞倫祭司的兒子以他瑪的管理；

en: But to the sons of Kohath he gave none, because they were charged with the service of the holy things that had to be carried on the shoulder.
zh: 但是沒有分給哥轄的子孫，因為他們所辦的事是聖所的事，是要用肩頭抬的。

en: And the chiefs offered offerings for the dedication of the altar on the day it was anointed; and the chiefs offered their offering before the altar.
zh: 用膏抹祭壇的日子，眾領袖都獻上奉獻祭壇的禮物；眾領袖把自己的供物獻在祭壇前。

en: And the LORD said to Moses, "They shall offer their offerings, one chief each day, for the dedication of the altar."
zh: 耶和華對摩西說：“眾領袖要獻上自己奉獻祭壇的供物，每天要有一位領袖來獻上供物。”

en: He who offered his offering the first day was Nahshon the son of Amminadab, of the tribe of Judah.
zh: 頭一天獻上供物的，是猶大支派的亞米拿達的兒子拿順。

en: And his offering was one silver plate whose weight was 130 shekels, one silver basin of 70 shekels, according to the shekel of the sanctuary, both of them full of fine flour mixed with oil for a grain offering;
zh: 他的供物是一個銀盤，重一公斤半，一個銀碗，重八百克，都是按聖所的秤；這兩樣都盛滿調油的細麵作素祭；

en: one golden dish of 10 shekels, full of incense;
zh: 一個金盂，重一百一十克，盛滿了香；

en: one bull from the herd, one ram, one male lamb a year old, for a burnt offering;
zh: 一頭公牛犢、一隻公綿羊、一隻一歲的公羊羔，作燔祭；

en: one male goat for a sin offering;
zh: 一隻公山羊作贖罪祭；

en: and for the sacrifice of peace offerings, two oxen, five rams, five male goats, and five male lambs a year old. This was the offering of Nahshon the son of Amminadab.
zh: 作平安祭的，是兩頭公牛、五隻公綿羊、五隻公山羊、五隻一歲的公羊羔；這是亞米拿達的兒子拿順的供物。

en: On the second day Nethanel the son of Zuar, the chief of Issachar, made an offering.
zh: 第二天來獻的，是以薩迦的領袖，蘇押的兒子拿坦業。

en: He offered for his offering one silver plate whose weight was 130 shekels, one silver basin of 70 shekels, according to the shekel of the sanctuary, both of them full of fine flour mixed with oil for a grain offering;
zh: 他獻上的供物是一個銀盤，重一公斤半，一個銀碗，重八百克，都是按聖所的秤；這兩樣都盛滿調油的細麵作素祭；

en: one golden dish of 10 shekels, full of incense;
zh: 一個金盂，重一百一十克，盛滿了香；

en: one bull from the herd, one ram, one male lamb a year old, for a burnt offering;
zh: 一頭公牛犢、一隻公綿羊、一隻一歲的公羊羔，作燔祭；

en: one male goat for a sin offering;
zh: 一隻公山羊作贖罪祭；

en: and for the sacrifice of peace offerings, two oxen, five rams, five male goats, and five male lambs a year old. This was the offering of Nethanel the son of Zuar.
zh: 作平安祭的，是兩頭公牛、五隻公綿羊、五隻公山羊、五隻一歲的公羊羔；這是蘇押的兒子拿坦業的供物。

en: On the third day Eliab the son of Helon, the chief of the people of Zebulun:
zh: 第三天來獻的，是西布倫子孫的領袖，希倫的兒子以利押。

en: his offering was one silver plate whose weight was 130 shekels, one silver basin of 70 shekels, according to the shekel of the sanctuary, both of them full of fine flour mixed with oil for a grain offering;
zh: 他的供物是一個銀盤，重一公斤半，一個銀碗，重八百克，都是按聖所的秤；這兩樣都盛滿調油的細麵作素祭；

en: one golden dish of 10 shekels, full of incense;
zh: 一個金盂，重一百一十克，盛滿了香；

en: one bull from the herd, one ram, one male lamb a year old, for a burnt offering;
zh: 一頭公牛犢、一隻公綿羊、一隻一歲的公羊羔，作燔祭；

en: one male goat for a sin offering;
zh: 一隻公山羊作贖罪祭；

en: and for the sacrifice of peace offerings, two oxen, five rams, five male goats, and five male lambs a year old. This was the offering of Eliab the son of Helon.
zh: 作平安祭的，是兩頭公牛、五隻公綿羊、五隻公山羊、五隻一歲的公羊羔；這是希倫的兒子以利押的供物。

en: On the fourth day Elizur the son of Shedeur, the chief of the people of Reuben:
zh: 第四天來獻的，是流本子孫的領袖，示丟珥的兒子以利蓿。

en: his offering was one silver plate whose weight was 130 shekels, one silver basin of 70 shekels, according to the shekel of the sanctuary, both of them full of fine flour mixed with oil for a grain offering;
zh: 他的供物是一個銀盤，重一公斤半，一個銀碗，重八百克，都是按聖所的秤；這兩樣都盛滿調油的細麵作素祭；

en: one golden dish of 10 shekels, full of incense;
zh: 一個金盂，重一百一十克，盛滿了香；

en: one bull from the herd, one ram, one male lamb a year old, for a burnt offering;
zh: 一頭公牛犢、一隻公綿羊、一隻一歲的公羊羔，作燔祭；

en: one male goat for a sin offering;
zh: 一隻公山羊作贖罪祭；

en: and for the sacrifice of peace offerings, two oxen, five rams, five male goats, and five male lambs a year old. This was the offering of Elizur the son of Shedeur.
zh: 作平安祭的，是兩頭公牛、五隻公綿羊、五隻公山羊、五隻一歲的公羊羔；這是示丟珥的兒子以利蓿的供物。

en: On the fifth day Shelumiel the son of Zurishaddai, the chief of the people of Simeon:
zh: 第五天來獻的，是西緬子孫的領袖，蘇利沙代的兒子示路蔑。

en: his offering was one silver plate whose weight was 130 shekels, one silver basin of 70 shekels, according to the shekel of the sanctuary, both of them full of fine flour mixed with oil for a grain offering;
zh: 他的供物是一個銀盤，重一公斤半，一個銀碗，重八百克，都是按聖所的秤；這兩樣都盛滿調油的細麵作素祭；

en: one golden dish of 10 shekels, full of incense;
zh: 一個金盂，重一百一十克，盛滿了香；

en: one bull from the herd, one ram, one male lamb a year old, for a burnt offering;
zh: 一頭公牛犢、一隻公綿羊、一隻一歲的公羊羔，作燔祭；

en: one male goat for a sin offering;
zh: 一隻公山羊作贖罪祭；

en: and for the sacrifice of peace offerings, two oxen, five rams, five male goats, and five male lambs a year old. This was the offering of Shelumiel the son of Zurishaddai.
zh: 作平安祭的，是兩頭公牛、五隻公綿羊、五隻公山羊、五隻一歲的公羊羔；這是蘇利沙代的兒子示路蔑的供物。

en: On the sixth day Eliasaph the son of Deuel, the chief of the people of Gad:
zh: 第六天來獻的，是迦得子孫的領袖，丟珥的兒子以利雅薩。

en: his offering was one silver plate whose weight was 130 shekels, one silver basin of 70 shekels, according to the shekel of the sanctuary, both of them full of fine flour mixed with oil for a grain offering;
zh: 他的供物是一個銀盤，重一公斤半，一個銀碗，重八百克，都是按聖所的秤；這兩樣都盛滿調油的細麵作素祭；

en: one golden dish of 10 shekels, full of incense;
zh: 一個金盂，重一百一十克，盛滿了香；

en: one bull from the herd, one ram, one male lamb a year old, for a burnt offering;
zh: 一頭公牛犢、一隻公綿羊、一隻一歲的公羊羔，作燔祭；

en: one male goat for a sin offering;
zh: 一隻公山羊作贖罪祭；

en: and for the sacrifice of peace offerings, two oxen, five rams, five male goats, and five male lambs a year old. This was the offering of Eliasaph the son of Deuel.
zh: 作平安祭的，是兩頭公牛、五隻公綿羊、五隻公山羊、五隻一歲的公羊羔；這就是丟珥的兒子以利雅薩的供物。

en: On the seventh day Elishama the son of Ammihud, the chief of the people of Ephraim:
zh: 第七天來獻的，是以法蓮子孫的領袖，亞米忽的兒子以利沙瑪。

en: his offering was one silver plate whose weight was 130 shekels, one silver basin of 70 shekels, according to the shekel of the sanctuary, both of them full of fine flour mixed with oil for a grain offering;
zh: 他的供物是一個銀盤，重一公斤半，一個銀碗，重八百克，都是按聖所的秤；這兩樣都盛滿調油的細麵作素祭；

en: one golden dish of 10 shekels, full of incense;
zh: 一個金盂，重一百一十克，盛滿了香；

en: one bull from the herd, one ram, one male lamb a year old, for a burnt offering;
zh: 一頭公牛犢、一隻公綿羊、一隻一歲的公羊羔，作燔祭；

en: one male goat for a sin offering;
zh: 一隻公山羊作贖罪祭；

en: and for the sacrifice of peace offerings, two oxen, five rams, five male goats, and five male lambs a year old. This was the offering of Elishama the son of Ammihud.
zh: 作平安祭的，是兩頭公牛、五隻公綿羊、五隻公山羊、五隻一歲的公羊羔；這是亞米忽的兒子以利沙瑪的供物。

en: On the eighth day Gamaliel the son of Pedahzur, the chief of the people of Manasseh:
zh: 第八天來獻的，是瑪拿西子孫的領袖，比大蓿的兒子迦瑪列。

en: his offering was one silver plate whose weight was 130 shekels, one silver basin of 70 shekels, according to the shekel of the sanctuary, both of them full of fine flour mixed with oil for a grain offering;
zh: 他的供物是一個銀盤，重一公斤半，一個銀碗，重八百克，都是按聖所的秤；這兩樣都盛滿調油的細麵作素祭；

en: one golden dish of 10 shekels, full of incense;
zh: 一個金盂，重一百一十克，盛滿了香；

en: one bull from the herd, one ram, one male lamb a year old, for a burnt offering;
zh: 一頭公牛犢、一隻公綿羊、一隻一歲的公羊羔，作燔祭；

en: one male goat for a sin offering;
zh: 一隻公山羊作贖罪祭；

en: and for the sacrifice of peace offerings, two oxen, five rams, five male goats, and five male lambs a year old. This was the offering of Gamaliel the son of Pedahzur.
zh: 作平安祭的，是兩頭公牛、五隻公綿羊、五隻公山羊、五隻一歲的公羊羔；這是比大蓿的兒子迦瑪列的供物。

en: On the ninth day Abidan the son of Gideoni, the chief of the people of Benjamin:
zh: 第九天來獻供物的，是便雅憫子孫的領袖，基多尼的兒子亞比但。

en: his offering was one silver plate whose weight was 130 shekels, one silver basin of 70 shekels, according to the shekel of the sanctuary, both of them full of fine flour mixed with oil for a grain offering;
zh: 他的供物是一個銀盤，重一公斤半，一個銀碗，重八百克，都是按聖所的秤；這兩樣都盛滿調油的細麵作素祭；

en: one golden dish of 10 shekels, full of incense;
zh: 一個金盂，重一百一十克，盛滿了香；

en: one bull from the herd, one ram, one male lamb a year old, for a burnt offering;
zh: 一頭公牛犢、一隻公綿羊、一隻一歲的公羊羔，作燔祭；

en: one male goat for a sin offering;
zh: 一隻公山羊作贖罪祭；

en: and for the sacrifice of peace offerings, two oxen, five rams, five male goats, and five male lambs a year old. This was the offering of Abidan the son of Gideoni.
zh: 作平安祭的，是兩頭公牛、五隻公綿羊、五隻公山羊、五隻一歲的公羊羔；這是基多尼的兒子亞比但的供物。

en: On the tenth day Ahiezer the son of Ammishaddai, the chief of the people of Dan:
zh: 第十天來獻的，是但子孫的領袖，亞米沙代的兒子亞希以謝。

en: his offering was one silver plate whose weight was 130 shekels, one silver basin of 70 shekels, according to the shekel of the sanctuary, both of them full of fine flour mixed with oil for a grain offering;
zh: 他的供物是一個銀盤，重一公斤半，一個銀碗，重八百克，都是按聖所的秤；這兩樣都盛滿調油的細麵作素祭；

en: one golden dish of 10 shekels, full of incense;
zh: 一個金盂，重一百一十克，盛滿了香；

en: one bull from the herd, one ram, one male lamb a year old, for a burnt offering;
zh: 一頭公牛犢、一隻公綿羊、一隻一歲的公羊羔，作燔祭；

en: one male goat for a sin offering;
zh: 一隻公山羊作贖罪祭；

en: and for the sacrifice of peace offerings, two oxen, five rams, five male goats, and five male lambs a year old. This was the offering of Ahiezer the son of Ammishaddai.
zh: 作平安祭的，是兩頭公牛、五隻公綿羊、五隻公山羊、五隻一歲的公羊羔；這是亞米沙代的兒子亞希以謝的供物。

en: On the eleventh day Pagiel the son of Ochran, the chief of the people of Asher:
zh: 第十一天來獻的，是亞設子孫的領袖，俄蘭的兒子帕結。

en: his offering was one silver plate whose weight was 130 shekels, one silver basin of 70 shekels, according to the shekel of the sanctuary, both of them full of fine flour mixed with oil for a grain offering;
zh: 他的供物是一個銀盤，重一公斤半，一個銀碗，重八百克，都是按聖所的秤；這兩樣都盛滿調油的細麵作素祭；

en: one golden dish of 10 shekels, full of incense;
zh: 一個金盂，重一百一十克，盛滿了香；

en: one bull from the herd, one ram, one male lamb a year old, for a burnt offering;
zh: 一頭公牛犢、一隻公綿羊、一隻一歲的公羊羔，作燔祭；

en: one male goat for a sin offering;
zh: 一隻公山羊作贖罪祭；

en: and for the sacrifice of peace offerings, two oxen, five rams, five male goats, and five male lambs a year old. This was the offering of Pagiel the son of Ochran.
zh: 作平安祭的，是兩頭公牛、五隻公綿羊、五隻公山羊、五隻一歲的公羊羔；這是俄蘭的兒子帕結的供物。

en: On the twelfth day Ahira the son of Enan, the chief of the people of Naphtali:
zh: 第十二天來獻的，是拿弗他利子孫的領袖，以南的兒子亞希拉。

en: his offering was one silver plate whose weight was 130 shekels, one silver basin of 70 shekels, according to the shekel of the sanctuary, both of them full of fine flour mixed with oil for a grain offering;
zh: 他的供物是一個銀盤，重一公斤半，一個銀碗，重八百克，都是按聖所的秤；這兩樣都盛滿調油的細麵作素祭；

en: one golden dish of 10 shekels, full of incense;
zh: 一個金盂，重一百一十克，盛滿了香；

en: one bull from the herd, one ram, one male lamb a year old, for a burnt offering;
zh: 一頭公牛犢、一隻公綿羊、一隻一歲的公羊羔，作燔祭；

en: one male goat for a sin offering;
zh: 一頭公山羊作贖罪祭；

en: and for the sacrifice of peace offerings, two oxen, five rams, five male goats, and five male lambs a year old. This was the offering of Ahira the son of Enan.
zh: 作平安祭的，是兩頭公牛、五隻公綿羊、五隻公山羊、五隻一歲的公羊羔；這是以南的兒子亞希拉的供物。

en: This was the dedication offering for the altar on the day when it was anointed, from the chiefs of Israel: twelve silver plates, twelve silver basins, twelve golden dishes,
zh: 用膏抹祭壇的日子，以色列的眾領袖獻上奉獻祭壇的供物，共有銀盤十二個、銀碗十二個、金盂十二個，

en: each silver plate weighing 130 shekels and each basin 70, all the silver of the vessels 2,400 shekels according to the shekel of the sanctuary,
zh: 每個銀盤重一公斤半，每個銀碗重八百克；一切器皿的銀子，按聖所的秤，共有二十七公斤零六百克；

en: the twelve golden dishes, full of incense, weighing 10 shekels apiece according to the shekel of the sanctuary, all the gold of the dishes being 120 shekels;
zh: 金盂十二個，盛滿了香，按聖所的秤，每個金盂重一百一十克；這些金盂的金子，共有一公斤零三百二十克；

en: all the cattle for the burnt offering twelve bulls, twelve rams, twelve male lambs a year old, with their grain offering; and twelve male goats for a sin offering;
zh: 作燔祭的牲畜，共有公牛犢十二頭、公綿羊十二隻、一歲的公羊羔十二隻，還有同獻的素祭，以及作贖罪祭的公山羊十二隻；

en: and all the cattle for the sacrifice of peace offerings twenty-four bulls, the rams sixty, the male goats sixty, the male lambs a year old sixty. This was the dedication offering for the altar after it was anointed.
zh: 作平安祭的牲畜，共有公牛二十四頭、公綿羊六十隻、公山羊六十隻、一歲的公羊羔六十隻；這就是用膏抹祭壇以後，所獻上奉獻祭壇的供物。

en: And when Moses went into the tent of meeting to speak with the LORD, he heard the voice speaking to him from above the mercy seat that was on the ark of the testimony, from between the two cherubim; and it spoke to him.
zh: 摩西進入會幕要與耶和華說話的時候，就聽見法櫃的施恩座上，二基路伯中間，有與他說話的聲音，是耶和華與他說話。
